creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Weird... But the patch breaks other commands for me:

# service postgresql status
postgresql is not running.
# cat /usr/local/pgsql/data/postmaster.pid
62483
/usr/local/pgsql/data
1459888343
5432
/tmp
localhost
  5432001    196609
# ps ax | grep -v grep | grep 62483
62483  3- I       0:00,69 /usr/local/bin/postgres -D /usr/local/pgsql/data

Dunno why but check_pidfile from rc.subr is not executed. Same applies to stop. Checked on 10.2 with postgresql 9.4/9.2.
